title: Manifeste publié
sources: README.md: Project philosophy and ROM awakening requirements [cite: 2]
forom-config.ts: Default category and question labels [cite: 3]
quests.ts: Foundational quest list for public forom
database.sql: Schema for the memos and user tables
package.json: Application dependencies and core tech stack
App.tsx: Currency logic and quest reward implementation
resume: The quest "Manifeste publié" (A5) marks the formal completion of the community's primary strategic document within the Vision district. Situated at the "Accompli" coordinate of the 10x10 FRM grid, this milestone signifies that the foundational philosophy has transitioned from a draft chantier into a canonized archive. [cite: 3] In the context of Phase 1: The Foundations, the publication of this manifesto is a requirement for the community to eventually reach the 100-memo goal needed to unlock Phase 2. [cite: 2] The document itself serves as the definitive response to the community's core mission: "Save human communities and long-term memory". [cite: 2] Technically, the successful publication of this memo is recorded in the local PostgreSQL "memos" table, linking the user’s contribution to Category A and Action 5. This data is rendered through a high-performance frontend stack utilizing React 19, Vite 7, and Tailwind 4, which ensures the spatial 5x5 viewport provides a seamless navigation experience. [cite: 2] For the contributor, completing this quest results in a reward of 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP, contributing to their overall level and title progression within the ecosystem. The publication of the manifesto is not just a social event; it is a technical anchoring of "Deep Lore" that will eventually be ingested by ROM, the local RAG engine. [cite: 2] By hosting this finalized document on local hardware like an NVIDIA Jetson, the community maintains absolute data sovereignty, ensuring that the manifesto remains private and protected from centralized cloud entities. [cite: 2] This sovereign record-keeping is vital for long-term memory transfer, particularly in pilot projects like the ETS Clubs, where graduating generations must pass down their core values and governance structures. [cite: 2] Once published, this version enters the V1 Archive. [cite: 2] It will undergo further iterations in V2 and V3 to refine precision before the Awakening ritual. [cite: 2] The publication at A5 provides the stable reference point necessary for all subsequent districts, such as Equipe and Strategy, to align operations. This alignment ensures the forom remains a focused command center rather than a fragmented social feed. [cite: 2] Thus, A5 is the cornerstone of community identity. [cite: 2] Every published memo acts as a permanent brick in the foundational wall, reinforcing the structural integrity for the next decade. [cite: 2] Ultimately.
summary: The 'Manifeste publié' quest (A5) canonizes the community's vision at the 'Accompli' coordinate, rewarding the contributor with 2 PX and securing the document for future ROM AI training.
